positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric illustration of a celestial crescent moon embracing a stylized mountain range and a single, soaring owl. The composition should be perfectly centered and scalable, using clean, thick silhouettes (black lines on a bright, off-white background). Incorporate abstract patterns of constellations and gentle, stylized star dust elements. The overall mood is magical, tranquil, and sophisticated. Style: Mid-century modern graphic design meets Japanese woodblock print, with crisp vector quality. Composition: Radial symmetry, ideal for chest area print placement. Lighting: Flat, uniform, high contrast. Color palette: Monochromatic with accents of deep indigo and muted gold.
negative: blur, grain, low quality, artifact, noise, watermark, text, signature, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradients, photorealism, muddy colors, complex shading
